title: Billboard Graphic
text: The billboard dataset from the tidyr package tracks the weekly rank of songs that entered the Billboard Hot 100 in the year 2000. Below, we visualize the trajectory of the 17 songs that successfully reached the #1 spot, highlighting a few of the most long-lasting and memorable hits of that year.
